post_completion_updates.update_reason: Drafted the Darcy static-operator benchmark execution plan and updated roadmap discoverability after literature calibration.
post_completion_updates.decision: next selector scope may implement Darcy static-operator support and strong local baselines while 2D diffusion-reaction remains data-blocked
post_completion_updates.baseline_rule: Darcy strong-baseline interpretation requires FNO and a non-toy U-Net; tiny smoke U-Net is readiness-only.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Implemented Darcy static-operator support, strong-baseline gates, literature-context reporting, readiness execution, and full-run budget.
post_completion_updates.decision: Darcy support is readiness-complete but benchmark-incomplete; no performance claim is allowed until the full available training-split run completes for Hybrid ResNet, FNO, and unet_strong.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Pivoted the third active PDEBench image-suite member from 2D diffusion-reaction to official 128x128 2D Compressible Navier-Stokes and started local data staging after the storage gate passed.
post_completion_updates.decision: 2D diffusion-reaction is deferred and must not block the active suite; the next CNS tranche remains data/schema-gated until the preferred official 128x128 CNS file is fully downloaded, checksum-verified, and inspected.
post_completion_updates.metric_requirement: CNS benchmark interpretation requires denormalized nRMSE/RMSE plus Fourier-space fRMSE low/mid/high bands; fRMSE_high is the required shock/small-scale diagnostic.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Implemented the 2D Compressible Navier-Stokes adapter and current metric contract while the official HDF5 staging continues.
post_completion_updates.decision: CNS adapter support is code/test-complete for synthetic and preflight-blocked paths; real-data schema inspection and readiness smoke remain gated on the active checksum-verified HDF5 download.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Verified the official CNS HDF5, reran suite preflight to all-ready status, and completed a capped real-data CNS readiness smoke on CUDA.
post_completion_updates.decision: CNS readiness is complete and all three PDEBench image-suite tasks are now preflight-ready, but CNS remains benchmark-incomplete until full-training Hybrid ResNet, FNO, and unet_strong rows run on the full available training split.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: User requested rerunning the CNS comparison on a non-trivial capped dataset size instead of the 2-window smoke.
post_completion_updates.decision: A larger capped readiness comparison now exists and is more informative than the original tiny smoke, but it remains non-benchmark evidence because the training set is still heavily capped.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: User requested aligning the CNS training loss with the literature-backed PDEBench baseline contract instead of the earlier local MAE pilot.
post_completion_updates.decision: The CNS runner now trains Hybrid ResNet, FNO, and U-Net with MSE, matching the official PDEBench FNO/U-Net forward baseline code; the corrected capped 10-epoch rerun supersedes the earlier MAE pilot for protocol alignment.

training_loss.name: mse
training_loss.definition: mean squared error on normalized CNS fields
training_loss.rationale: Matches the official PDEBench FNO/U-Net forward baseline training code for the compressible CFD benchmarks.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: User requested a reusable CNS-only physics-loss framework behind a generic interface, with v1 terms limited to positivity, continuity residual, and global mass.
post_completion_updates.decision: The PDEBench image-suite now has a reusable default-off physics-regularization framework with a real `2d_cfd_cns` backend. CNS metadata exposes physical spacing and boundary information, the shared CNS runner can train Hybrid/FNO/U-Net with denormalized physics terms, and an enabled bounded smoke confirmed artifacted end-to-end behavior.
verification: python scripts/studies/run_pdebench_image128_suite.py --task 2d_cfd_cns --mode readiness --data-root /home/ollie/Documents/pdebench-data --output-root .artifacts/NEURIPS-HYBRID-RESNET-2026/phase-2-pdebench-2d-cfd-cns/readiness-cap-20260421T210000Z-physics-smoke --profiles hybrid_resnet_base --history-len 2 --epochs 1 --batch-size 4 --max-train-trajectories 8 --max-val-trajectories 2 --max-test-trajectories 2 --max-windows-per-trajectory 2 --device cuda --num-workers 0 --physics-regularization on --physics-loss-weights pos=1.0,cont=0.5,mass=0.25 -> exit 0

post_completion_updates.update_reason: User requested executing the spectral weight-sharing CNS compare tranche to add the non-shared row, run the capped comparison, and render the galleries.
post_completion_updates.decision: The PDEBench CNS suite now has a manual opt-in `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_noshare` row. On the capped 10-epoch same-shell CNS compare, the non-shared row improved every tracked eval metric over the shared spectral row, while pressure striping remained visible in both, so the non-shared row is a serious follow-up candidate but not yet a default promotion.

post_completion_updates.update_reason: Completed the durable Markov-style CNS backlog item after auditing the frozen history-2 anchors, backfilling the missing 40-epoch `hybrid_resnet_cns` reference row, and writing the final cross-history compare sidecars.
post_completion_updates.decision: Reducing the capped local CNS contract from `history_len=2` to `history_len=1` did not improve `spectral_resnet_bottleneck_base` or change the four-row ranking at 10 or 40 epochs; aggregate denormalized error worsened for spectral, `hybrid_resnet_cns`, and `fno_base`, while only `unet_strong` improved and still remained last.
